ruling: (B) DEFERRED, AGGREGATION-CLEARED, pending ENDS — NOT closed (Anne 9a). The individual-level status model does not reveal an amplifying dependence the cell-level aggregation hid; the aggregation concern (B7) is cleared. But a cascade is a process in time, which only the ENDS true-transition test (2c-ii) observes. Stage 3 sufficiency may proceed in parallel as a no-reflexivity model.
